description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and define variables BUILD_LOCAL_DEPENDENCIES, DEPENDENCIES, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY. Add a build_on_ubuntu-artful job that uses the ubuntu:artful image, runs before_script commands apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq -y software-properties-common; add-apt-repository -y -u -m ppa:eclufsc/ophidian; apt-get install -qq -y $DEPENDENCIES; then script commands mkdir build && cd build; cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ..; make -j; ./hello_world -v ../input_files/simple/simple.v -d ../input_files/simple/simple.def -l ../input_files/simple/simple.lef, and archives the build/ directory as an artifact. Add a build_on_ubuntu-bionic job identical to the previous one but using the ubuntu:bionic image. Add a build_using_dependencies_script_on_source job using ubuntu:artful that runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq -y $BUILD_LOCAL_DEPENDENCIES; then script echo \"y\" | bash build_dependencies.sh; mkdir build && cd build; cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ..; make -j; ./hello_world -v ../input_files/simple/simple.v -d ../input_files/simple/simple.def -l ../input_files/simple/simple.lef, with the build/ artifact. Add a build_using_dependencies_script_on_system job also on ubuntu:artful that runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq -y $BUILD_LOCAL_DEPENDENCIES; then script echo y | bash build_dependencies.sh --install_to /usr/local; mkdir build && cd build; cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ..; make -j; ./hello_world -v ../input_files/simple/simple.v -d ../input_files/simple/simple.def -l ../input_files/simple/simple.lef, publishing the same artifact.
